features: 🎀Material: Our Christmas tree bows are made of good quality foam, with strong structure, won't easily lose looks and shapes after touching for many times, which can last for long time

🎀Size: the glitter ribbon bow tie measures approx. 25 x 30 cm / 9.8x11.8inches, this general size is suitable for Christmas tree topper decoration, Christmas Door/Wall Decoration, Christmas wreath/Garland, Christmas tree ornament and Christmas pendants, which are full of festive atmosphere
🎀Multiple Color Selection: the Christmas tree bow decorations contain 5 different colors, red, silver,white,gold and rose gold, the bow style is a classic Christmas element

🎀Widely Application: Use them to decoration your trees, treetop, garland, wreath, lightpost, gift boxes, porch, door,windows, fences, and much more. It is so beautiful and adds a lot of joy to the home
🎀Best Gift: Our Christmas ornament is in exquisite style, perfect Christmas Gifts for Your Neighbors, Extended Family, Friend, Grandparents, etc
